prompt.content: Point A is reflected across line m to create point A′. Which statement must be true?

<svg viewBox='0 0 260 180' role='img' aria-label='Point A reflected across vertical line m to point A prime'><line x1='130' y1='25' x2='130' y2='155' stroke='black' stroke-width='3'/><text x='138' y='35' font-size='15'>m</text><circle cx='75' cy='95' r='5' fill='black'/><text x='55' y='88' font-size='15'>A</text><circle cx='185' cy='95' r='5' fill='black'/><text x='193' y='88' font-size='15'>A′</text><line x1='75' y1='95' x2='185' y2='95' stroke='gray' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/><circle cx='130' cy='95' r='4' fill='white' stroke='black' stroke-width='2'/></svg>

choices.content: Line m is perpendicular to segment AA′ and passes through its midpoint.
Line m is parallel to segment AA′.
A and A′ must be on the same side of line m.
A must be farther from line m than A′.

steps.content: For a reflection, the line of reflection is perpendicular to the segment connecting a point and its image, and it bisects that segment.
